title: OptCarpetAddition
body:
# OptCarpetAddition

> This is an extension module of `Carpet`. The goal is to add some functions that do not greatly change the original game mechanism but optimize the player experience.

**_WARNING_: Don't download mod jar files with the `-source` suffix, it is just for development!!!**

**_Note_: Official release updates of the project may not be timely. If you don't find the version you want on `modrinth`, `curseforge`, or the `github release`, check the [GitHub Actions](https://github.com/OptiJava/OptCarpetAddition/actions) for builds (action-run builds are not fully tested and may be unstable).**


## Support Status

Most other MC versions that are the same as the supported major versions but have different minor versions can be directly installed and work properly, but **the stability cannot be guaranteed. _Please use them with caution._**

| Minecraft Version | Support Status                      |
|-------------------|-------------------------------------|
| 1.20.4            | Supporting, developing actively     |
| 1.20.1            | Supporting, developing actively     |
| 1.19.3            | Supporting, developing actively     |
| 1.18.2            | Supporting, developing actively     |
| 1.17.1            | Supporting, developing actively     |
| 1.16.5            | Not supporting, development stopped |

## Docs

[Rules](https://github.com/OptiJava/OptCarpetAddition/blob/master/README-en.md#rules)
\
[Command](https://github.com/OptiJava/OptCarpetAddition/blob/master/README-en.md#command)
\
[Logger](https://github.com/OptiJava/OptCarpetAddition/blob/master/README-en.md#logger)

## Download

Download in [GitHub](https://github.com/OptiJava/OptCarpetAddition/releases/latest) or Modrinth.

## Dependency

**_Requires:_**
- fabric-loader 
- fabric-api
- fabric-carpet 


**If you find bugs in this mod,please report it in [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OptiJava/OptCarpetAddition/issues), thank you so much.**
